# TS9209

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Cannot evaluate expression at compile time
```

## Explanation

This expression cannot be evaluated at compile time.

Compile-time evaluation requires:
- Literal values (numbers, strings, booleans)
- Simple arithmetic and string operations
- Pure functions without side effects
- No references to runtime values

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
